setting.note: Brussels, thinly disguised as Villette: the boarding school on the Rue d’Isabelle where Brontë herself taught, the park, the old Flemish streets. She mapped her own two years into it, and it brings Belgium into the atlas.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. Charlotte Brontë published this in 1853.
